## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the [WordPress Coding Standards](https://developer.wordpress.org/coding-standards/wordpress-coding-standards/).
- [ ] I ran `composer run cs` locally and there are no errors.
- [ ] I ran `composer run test` locally and all tests pass.
- [ ] I updated CHANGELOG.md if this change is user-facing.
- [ ] I added inline documentation for any new public functions or classes.
